summary: Update a proposal of the project

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description: Unique company identifier associated with the Procore User Account.

data.description: Represents a proposal within a bid board project.

id.description: The unique identifier of the proposal.

quote_nr.description: The quote number of the proposal.

include_in_primary_estimate.description: Indicates whether the proposal should be included in the primary estimate.

total.description: The total amount of the proposal.

scope_of_work.description: The scope of work of the proposal.

is_procore_bid_form_alternate.description: Indicates whether the proposal is an alternate Procore bid form.

procore_change_event_id.description: The change event identifier of the proposal.

schema.description:
Represents the request body for partially updating an existing proposal.
Only properties with specified Optional`1 values will be updated.

name.description: The new name of the proposal, if the name should be updated.

type.description: The new type of the proposal, if the type should be updated.

notes.description: The updated notes for the proposal, if the notes should be changed.

scope_of_work.description: The updated scope of work for the proposal, if it should be changed.

inclusions.description: The updated list of inclusions for the proposal, if they should be changed.

exclusions.description: The updated list of exclusions for the proposal, if they should be changed.

include_in_primary_estimate.description: Indicates whether the proposal should be included in the primary estimate, if this flag should be updated.
